Klasse UserResource

java.lang.Object
at.jku.se.resource.UserResource
@ApplicationScoped @Path("/api/users") @Produces("application/json") @Consumes("application/json") public class UserResource extends Object
REST resource for user management. Handles registration (FR-01), login (FR-02), and member invitation (FR-20).

  • Konstruktorübersicht

    Konstruktoren
    Konstruktor
    Beschreibung
    UserResource()
    Default constructor required by CDI.

  • Methodenübersicht

    Modifikator und Typ
    Methode
    Beschreibung
    jakarta.ws.rs.core.Response
    delete(Long id)
    Deletes a user account and all associated data.
    jakarta.ws.rs.core.Response
    getById(Long id)
    Returns a single user by ID.
    jakarta.ws.rs.core.Response
    inviteMember(Long ownerId, @Valid InviteRequest request)
    Invites a new member by creating an account with MEMBER role (FR-20).
    List<UserResponse>
    listAll()
    Returns all registered users.
    jakarta.ws.rs.core.Response
    login(@Valid UserLoginRequest request)
    Authenticates a user with email and password (FR-02).
    jakarta.ws.rs.core.Response
    register(@Valid UserRegisterRequest request)
    Registers a new user with a hashed password (FR-01, NFR-02).
    jakarta.ws.rs.core.Response
    revokeMember(Long memberId)
    Revokes a member's access by deleting their account (FR-20).

    Von Klasse geerbte Methoden Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Konstruktordetails

    • UserResource

      public UserResource()
      Default constructor required by CDI.

  • Methodendetails

    • listAll

      @GET public List<UserResponse> listAll()
      Returns all registered users.
      Gibt zurück:
      list of all users

    • getById

      @GET @Path("/{id}") public jakarta.ws.rs.core.Response getById(@PathParam("id") Long id)
      Returns a single user by ID.
      Parameter:
      id - the user ID
      Gibt zurück:
      the user or 404

    • register

      @POST @Path("/register") public jakarta.ws.rs.core.Response register(@Valid @Valid UserRegisterRequest request)
      Registers a new user with a hashed password (FR-01, NFR-02).
      Parameter:
      request - registration data
      Gibt zurück:
      201 with the created user, or 409 if email already exists

    • login

      @POST @Path("/login") public jakarta.ws.rs.core.Response login(@Valid @Valid UserLoginRequest request)
      Authenticates a user with email and password (FR-02).
      Parameter:
      request - login credentials
      Gibt zurück:
      200 with user info, or 401 on invalid credentials

    • inviteMember

      @POST @Path("/{ownerId}/invite") public jakarta.ws.rs.core.Response inviteMember(@PathParam("ownerId") Long ownerId, @Valid @Valid InviteRequest request)
      Invites a new member by creating an account with MEMBER role (FR-20). Must be called by an OWNER (enforcement left to future auth layer).
      Parameter:
      ownerId - the inviting owner's ID (for context)
      request - the invite details
      Gibt zurück:
      201 with the new member's info

    • revokeMember

      @DELETE @Path("/{memberId}/revoke") public jakarta.ws.rs.core.Response revokeMember(@PathParam("memberId") Long memberId)
      Revokes a member's access by deleting their account (FR-20).
      Parameter:
      memberId - the member's user ID
      Gibt zurück:
      204 on success, 404 if not found, 400 if trying to delete an owner

    • delete

      @DELETE @Path("/{id}") public jakarta.ws.rs.core.Response delete(@PathParam("id") Long id)
      Deletes a user account and all associated data.
      Parameter:
      id - the user ID
      Gibt zurück:
      204 on success, 404 if not found
